title: Engagement Scope
description: Machine-readable allowlist emitted by /engage.scope and enforced by scope_guard.py. Wildcards ("*.example.com") match sub-domains only — list the apex separately. out_of_scope always wins over in_scope.

authorization_ref.description: Reference to the signed authorization (letter/email/ticket id).

in_scope.description: Allowed assets. Each entry is a domain, *.wildcard, IP, CIDR, or URL.

out_of_scope.description: Explicitly forbidden assets (takes precedence over in_scope).

max_cidr_hosts.description: Refuse to expand a CIDR larger than this many hosts without an explicit override.

roe.description: Optional rules-of-engagement flags consumed by tooling.
